stimulus: Although the composers hoped that their symphony would be ______blank when performed in concert, critics generally agreed that the performance had the opposite effect, putting listeners to sleep instead of stirring them.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical and precise word or phrase?
rationale: Choice D is correct because the contrast with "putting listeners to sleep" requires a word meaning lively or energizing. "Exhilarating" fits. Choice A is incorrect because subtle does not contrast with sleepy. Choice B is incorrect because polished and sleepy are not opposites. Choice C is incorrect because realistic does not contrast meaningfully here.
